summary: Comprehensive testing of ScreenGuard POS inventory management system completed successfully. Backend API achieved 100% success rate for all POS features. Frontend authentication and main POS functionality working correctly with Arabic RTL support.

ui_bugs.issue: Session timeout causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation
ui_bugs.impact: Users need to re-authenticate frequently while testing different pages

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation overlay intercepting clicks on POS page elements
ui_bugs.impact: Some UI interactions blocked by navigation sidebar overlay

passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin@screenguard.com/Admin123! working
POST /api/customers - Customer creation working (100% success)
GET /api/customers - Customer listing working (100% success)
POST /api/suppliers - Supplier creation working (100% success)
GET /api/suppliers - Supplier listing working (100% success)
POST /api/sales - Sale creation with cash payment working (100% success)
POST /api/sales - Sale creation with bank payment working (100% success)
POST /api/sales - Sale creation with wallet payment working (100% success)
GET /api/sales - Sales listing working (100% success)
POST /api/sales/{id}/return - Sale return functionality working (100% success)
GET /api/cash-boxes - Cash box retrieval working (3 boxes: cash, bank, wallet)
POST /api/cash-boxes/transfer - Money transfer between boxes working (100% success)
GET /api/transactions - Transaction history working (100% success)
GET /api/stats - Dashboard stats with cash boxes working (100% success)
Frontend POS page loads correctly with authentication
Frontend POS search functionality working (iPhone search tested)
Frontend POS displays 6 products with Arabic names and DZD prices
Frontend POS cart functionality visible and accessible
Frontend POS payment method buttons (cash, bank, wallet) present
Frontend POS complete sale button (إتمام البيع) working
Frontend dashboard showing correct statistics (6 products, 3 customers, 3 suppliers, 210 دج total cash)
Arabic RTL layout working perfectly throughout the system
Currency display in Algerian Dinar (دج) working correctly
Multi-language support (Arabic/English) functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Address session timeout issues to improve user experience during navigation between pages. Consider extending session duration or implementing auto-refresh tokens.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Main POS functionality working, navigation overlay and session issues)
